motion.name: editorial-glide
motion.purpose: Standard entrance and state transition easing.

components.name: CTA Button (Ghost)
components.description: The primary interaction for brand heroes and major calls to action.
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { background: transparent; color: #f9f9f9; padding: 12px 40px; letter-spacing: 0.0560em; text-transform: uppercase; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.7rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; border: 1px solid rgba(249, 249, 249, 0.8); border-radius: 0; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: #f9f9f9; color: #5a252d; }

components.name: Navigation Link
components.description: Standard navigation item with wide tracking.
components.css: .ds-nav-link { color: #5a252d; opacity: 0.55; text-decoration: none; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.0560em; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.7rem; font-family: 'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif; transition: opacity 0.3s; cursor: pointer; } .ds-nav-link:hover { opacity: 1; }

narrative.overview: SECERA is a space of calm confidence and high-fashion aspiration. The interface feels like a premium print magazine: spacious, typographically driven, and intentionally sharp.

rules.name: The No-Gradient Rule
rules.body: Never use gradients for backgrounds or text. Color is always solid and confident.

rules.name: The Zero Radius Doctrine
rules.body: Every edge is a clean 90-degree angle. We avoid rounded corners to maintain a premium feel.

rules.name: The Editorial Title Rule
rules.body: Headings should always use Bodoni Moda with tight tracking for that high-end magazine look.

dos: Do use border-radius: 0 for every single element.
Do use Bodoni Moda for headlines.
Do use #f6f2ec (Paper) as the default background.
donts: Don't use rounded corners unless it's a circular icon button.
Don't use blue or teal accents.
Don't use dark mode as a default.
